message:
Add Value::as_i64_scalar, as_bool_scalar, dtype() and TensorValue::to_i64_vec

Symmetric accessor methods for integer and boolean scalars alongside
the existing as_f64_scalar. Value::dtype() returns the DType without
pattern matching. TensorValue::to_i64_vec() parallels to_f64_vec().
Includes 6 tests covering all new methods and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
